title: Combat Test Core
text: The first playable version focuses on quick entry, random battlefield spawns, starter equipment restoration and infinite supplies for constant PvP testing.

title: Learning Through War
text: The first public server is intentionally simple: players fight, report issues and help us discover what oldschool PvP should feel like.

title: Reward Systems
text: Frag rewards, titles and small progression systems are planned after the first real combat feedback comes in.
